title: LibreExpFix (Fixes "0 Experience" Bug)
description: A small mod that fixed experience bug after teleporting across dimension
body:
This mod is no longer needed in MC 1.21 (or newer) as the bug has been fixed on 24w20a (1.21).

---

A small mod that fixed experience bug after teleporting across dimensions [MC-124177](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-124177). So small that you don't even need FabricAPI!

---

For Forge users: Forge support will be stopped at MC1.20.2, future updates will only support NeoForge. Please consider migrating from LexForge to NeoForge.

---

You can test if this mod working properly by creating a superflat creative world, go into flight mode then execute these sequence of commands:
- `/effect give @p minecraft:night_vision 99999 1 true`  
- `/execute in the_nether run tp @s ~ 10 ~`  
- `/execute in overworld run tp @s ~ 10 ~`

If you still have night vision without having to wait a few seconds or experience doesn't disappear or your character is still in flight mode, then the mod is working.
